title: Remove libkpod
body: Finish removing the last remnant of libkpod, the CRI-O config. Replace getRuntime with a version that does not depend on the CRI-O config.

comments.body: Travis needs another graph driver forced. I'll add a command line flag to set graph driver and add it to the travis build.
LGTM, although I want to remove references to CRI-O from Code base.

Changes LGTM, however golang 1.9 tests are failng:

```
$ make install.tools
touch "/home/travis/gopath/.gopathok"
if [ ! -x "/home/travis/gopath/bin/git-validation" ]; then \
		go get -u github.com/vbatts/git-validation; \
	fi
package golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/terminal: unrecognized import path "golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/terminal" (https fetch: Get https://golang.org/x/crypto/ssh/terminal?go-get=1: dial tcp 74.125.70.141:443: i/o timeout)
make: *** [.install.gitvalidation] Error 1
The command "make install.tools" failed and exited with 2 during .
```
@TomSweeneyRedHat I think that's a network-related flake. Unfortunately, we don't have an easy way to rekick Travis like we do with Papr
@mheon if you go into the Details there is a Restart button on the right side that will restart failed tests.

:pushpin: Commit aa5798d has been approved by `rhatdan`
